metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty. [Interview](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/interviews/index.html). [Industry](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/industrie/index.html). 21/10/2025 • 5 minutes reading. [David Kemps](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/david-kemps/index.html). The manufacturing industry is under national and international pressure. Raw materials are expensive, deliveries are uncertain and technical personnel are scarce. Yet ABN AMRO sector expert David Kemps sees opportunities. “Those who think ahead and organize their chains smartly can even grow now.”. “The industry is all about stability,” says David Kemps, Manufacturing sector expert at ABN AMRO.

[David Kemps](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/david-kemps/index.html). The manufacturing industry is under national and international pressure. Raw materials are expensive, deliveries are uncertain and technical personnel are scarce. Yet ABN AMRO sector expert David Kemps sees opportunities. “Those who think ahead and organize their chains smartly can even grow now.”. “The industry is all about stability,” says David Kemps, Manufacturing sector expert at ABN AMRO. 'Companies must run their machines at a minimum of 80% occupancy to be profitable.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: The manufacturing industry is under national and international pressure. Raw materials are expensive, deliveries are uncertain and technical personnel are scarce. Yet ABN AMRO sector expert David Kemps sees opportunities. “Those who think ahead and organize their chains smartly can even grow now.”. “The industry is all about stability,” says David Kemps, Manufacturing sector expert at ABN AMRO. 'Companies must run their machines at a minimum of 80% occupancy to be profitable. As soon as deliveries falter or orders are lost, margins evaporate.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
Raw materials are expensive, deliveries are uncertain and technical personnel are scarce. Yet ABN AMRO sector expert David Kemps sees opportunities. “Those who think ahead and organize their chains smartly can even grow now.”. “The industry is all about stability,” says David Kemps, Manufacturing sector expert at ABN AMRO. 'Companies must run their machines at a minimum of 80% occupancy to be profitable. As soon as deliveries falter or orders are lost, margins evaporate. And it is precisely that stability that is now under pressure due to geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties.'
Resilience as key.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
Yet ABN AMRO sector expert David Kemps sees opportunities. “Those who think ahead and organize their chains smartly can even grow now.”. “The industry is all about stability,” says David Kemps, Manufacturing sector expert at ABN AMRO. 'Companies must run their machines at a minimum of 80% occupancy to be profitable. As soon as deliveries falter or orders are lost, margins evaporate. And it is precisely that stability that is now under pressure due to geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties.'
Resilience as key. This instability affects entrepreneurs directly: parts arrive late or not at all, suppliers suddenly implement price increases or deliver lower quality.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
'Companies must run their machines at a minimum of 80% occupancy to be profitable. As soon as deliveries falter or orders are lost, margins evaporate. And it is precisely that stability that is now under pressure due to geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties.'
Resilience as key. This instability affects entrepreneurs directly: parts arrive late or not at all, suppliers suddenly implement price increases or deliver lower quality. Kemps remembers a machine builder who had millions in stock during the corona period, but was unable to deliver due to the lack of a few circuits costing a few euros. “Then a detail undermines the entire security of supply and continuity.” According to Kemps, such an example shows how vulnerable the sector is to so-called single points of failure.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
As soon as deliveries falter or orders are lost, margins evaporate. And it is precisely that stability that is now under pressure due to geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties.'
Resilience as key. This instability affects entrepreneurs directly: parts arrive late or not at all, suppliers suddenly implement price increases or deliver lower quality. Kemps remembers a machine builder who had millions in stock during the corona period, but was unable to deliver due to the lack of a few circuits costing a few euros. “Then a detail undermines the entire security of supply and continuity.” According to Kemps, such an example shows how vulnerable the sector is to so-called single points of failure. 'A small component can become the bottleneck for an entire production line.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
And it is precisely that stability that is now under pressure due to geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties.'
Resilience as key. This instability affects entrepreneurs directly: parts arrive late or not at all, suppliers suddenly implement price increases or deliver lower quality. Kemps remembers a machine builder who had millions in stock during the corona period, but was unable to deliver due to the lack of a few circuits costing a few euros. “Then a detail undermines the entire security of supply and continuity.” According to Kemps, such an example shows how vulnerable the sector is to so-called single points of failure. 'A small component can become the bottleneck for an entire production line. That is why entrepreneurs must look much more closely at their dependencies: not only on suppliers, but also on transport, energy and personnel.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: This instability affects entrepreneurs directly: parts arrive late or not at all, suppliers suddenly implement price increases or deliver lower quality. Kemps remembers a machine builder who had millions in stock during the corona period, but was unable to deliver due to the lack of a few circuits costing a few euros. “Then a detail undermines the entire security of supply and continuity.” According to Kemps, such an example shows how vulnerable the sector is to so-called single points of failure. 'A small component can become the bottleneck for an entire production line. That is why entrepreneurs must look much more closely at their dependencies: not only on suppliers, but also on transport, energy and personnel. metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
David Kemps. Sector Banker Industry
Growth weakened. The fact that the sector is under tension is also evident from the forecasts. While ABN AMRO previously forecast 4% growth in 2025, this has been scaled back to 1%. A recovery to 3% seems possible before 2026, partly thanks to defense investments and increasing construction production.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
Sector Banker Industry
Growth weakened. The fact that the sector is under tension is also evident from the forecasts. While ABN AMRO previously forecast 4% growth in 2025, this has been scaled back to 1%. A recovery to 3% seems possible before 2026, partly thanks to defense investments and increasing construction production. But the prospects remain fragile. “The trade war that Donald Trump is instigating is inhibiting investments in food and agricultural machinery, for example,” says Kemps.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: The fact that the sector is under tension is also evident from the forecasts. While ABN AMRO previously forecast 4% growth in 2025, this has been scaled back to 1%. A recovery to 3% seems possible before 2026, partly thanks to defense investments and increasing construction production. But the prospects remain fragile. “The trade war that Donald Trump is instigating is inhibiting investments in food and agricultural machinery, for example,” says Kemps. 'The semiconductor industry is also in danger of being disrupted.' The NEVI Purchasing Managers Index now shows export orders at a standstill and according to CBS figures, business confidence is at a low point.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: While ABN AMRO previously forecast 4% growth in 2025, this has been scaled back to 1%. A recovery to 3% seems possible before 2026, partly thanks to defense investments and increasing construction production. But the prospects remain fragile. “The trade war that Donald Trump is instigating is inhibiting investments in food and agricultural machinery, for example,” says Kemps. 'The semiconductor industry is also in danger of being disrupted.' The NEVI Purchasing Managers Index now shows export orders at a standstill and according to CBS figures, business confidence is at a low point. SMEs are extra vulnerable. “They are often completely absorbed by the operation and lack the capacity for scenarios and risk spreading,” says Kemps.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: Bronkhorst High-Tech from Ruurlo is the world leader in low-flow technology and produces approximately 100,000 measuring and control devices annually, good for a market share of 8%. With 900 employees, the company serves a wide range of sectors, from semiconductors to biotechnology. According to board member Fergus van Beek, the Dutch branch is reaching its limits. 'We can build another building here, but can we find two hundred extra employees? Grid congestion also acts as a brake.' In 2023, Bronkhorst decided to spread production capacity internationally, with assembly facilities in Singapore and the US.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: With 900 employees, the company serves a wide range of sectors, from semiconductors to biotechnology. According to board member Fergus van Beek, the Dutch branch is reaching its limits. 'We can build another building here, but can we find two hundred extra employees? Grid congestion also acts as a brake.' In 2023, Bronkhorst decided to spread production capacity internationally, with assembly facilities in Singapore and the US. The German market worries Van Beek: 'The car industry is stagnating and investing less in innovation.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: Entrepreneurs responded with short-term solutions such as extra inventory and multiple suppliers. “That provides relief, but is rarely structural,” says Kemps. Long-term strategies lie in nearshoring, cooperation with more stable countries or alternative raw materials. 'Remanufacturing and recycling are pure risk spreading. metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: Long-term strategies lie in nearshoring, cooperation with more stable countries or alternative raw materials. 'Remanufacturing and recycling are pure risk spreading. Companies that invest in this now create buffers against future shocks.'. Collaboration in the chain is playing an increasingly important role in this. Companies are increasingly seeking partners to leverage joint purchasing power or to bring innovative materials to the market more quickly. “The old image of an isolated factory that arranges everything itself is making way for networks of companies that share risks,” says Kemps.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: 'Remanufacturing and recycling are pure risk spreading. Companies that invest in this now create buffers against future shocks.'. Collaboration in the chain is playing an increasingly important role in this. Companies are increasingly seeking partners to leverage joint purchasing power or to bring innovative materials to the market more quickly. “The old image of an isolated factory that arranges everything itself is making way for networks of companies that share risks,” says Kemps. The sales side is also changing.

Companies are increasingly seeking partners to leverage joint purchasing power or to bring innovative materials to the market more quickly. “The old image of an isolated factory that arranges everything itself is making way for networks of companies that share risks,” says Kemps. The sales side is also changing. Export dependence is risky as countries protect their industries.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: Collaboration in the chain is playing an increasingly important role in this. Companies are increasingly seeking partners to leverage joint purchasing power or to bring innovative materials to the market more quickly. “The old image of an isolated factory that arranges everything itself is making way for networks of companies that share risks,” says Kemps. The sales side is also changing. Export dependence is risky as countries protect their industries. In the short term, spreading customers and regions, and more competitive contracts, will help.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: Companies are increasingly seeking partners to leverage joint purchasing power or to bring innovative materials to the market more quickly. “The old image of an isolated factory that arranges everything itself is making way for networks of companies that share risks,” says Kemps. The sales side is also changing. Export dependence is risky as countries protect their industries. In the short term, spreading customers and regions, and more competitive contracts, will help. In the longer term, local4local will become important: production closer to the sales market.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: The sales side is also changing. Export dependence is risky as countries protect their industries. In the short term, spreading customers and regions, and more competitive contracts, will help. In the longer term, local4local will become important: production closer to the sales market. 'This prevents levies and is in line with the sentiment of locally produced goods.' New revenue models, such as maintenance, training or Product-as-a-Service, also ensure more stable income. > “Local4local prevents import duties and increases our chances.”.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
Fergus van Beek. Executive Board, Marketing & New Business at Bronkhorst High-Tech
Making a difference. Yet there are companies that grow in this turbulence. They distinguish themselves with tight organization, up-to-date data and flexibility. “Anyone who links ERP to stock, planning and invoicing can manage quickly and based on facts,” says Kemps. In addition, solid agreements with suppliers and purchase contracts with customers make the difference.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
Executive Board, Marketing & New Business at Bronkhorst High-Tech
Making a difference. Yet there are companies that grow in this turbulence. They distinguish themselves with tight organization, up-to-date data and flexibility. “Anyone who links ERP to stock, planning and invoicing can manage quickly and based on facts,” says Kemps. In addition, solid agreements with suppliers and purchase contracts with customers make the difference. 'And companies that spread their risks and have a healthy financial buffer are stronger.' Agility is the common thread.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: Yet there are companies that grow in this turbulence. They distinguish themselves with tight organization, up-to-date data and flexibility. “Anyone who links ERP to stock, planning and invoicing can manage quickly and based on facts,” says Kemps. In addition, solid agreements with suppliers and purchase contracts with customers make the difference. 'And companies that spread their risks and have a healthy financial buffer are stronger.' Agility is the common thread. Digitalization and automation increase predictability: AI checks, digital twins and data analysis make production more efficient.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text: They distinguish themselves with tight organization, up-to-date data and flexibility. “Anyone who links ERP to stock, planning and invoicing can manage quickly and based on facts,” says Kemps. In addition, solid agreements with suppliers and purchase contracts with customers make the difference. 'And companies that spread their risks and have a healthy financial buffer are stronger.' Agility is the common thread. Digitalization and automation increase predictability: AI checks, digital twins and data analysis make production more efficient. Sustainability fits in seamlessly with this. “Circular production and using alternative materials is no longer a luxury, but a prerequisite,” says Kemps. > “Entrepreneurs who only look at today risk failing tomorrow.”.

metadata.source_title: 20251021 - Manufacturing industry can still grow despite uncertainty

text:
Sector Banker Industry
Learning from multinationals. Major players have already learned to spread their chains. Parallel production lines, strategic inventories and contracts with room for price adjustments are commonplace. “What you see with the greats is that they have action options ready in every quadrant,” says Kemps. 'Entrepreneurs who only look at today risk failure tomorrow.' Medium-sized companies would also do well to draw up an annual strategy plan. 'Not a thick book, but a clear guideline.
